title: The Quarry Essentials
description: A lightweight modpack based on Simply Optimized, built for smooth performance and stability. It includes only the essentials needed for The Quarry - optimizations, basic quality-of-life, and nothing that changes survival gameplay.
body: A lightweight modpack based on Simply Optimized, built for smooth performance and stability. It includes only the essentials needed for The Quarry - optimizations, basic quality-of-life, and nothing that changes survival gameplay. Simple, fast, and ready to play.
